mapper.select: select a.grant_obj_id, a.grant_obj_type, b.user_name grant_obj_name from au_privilege_grant a join po_users b on a.grant_obj_id = b.user_id where grant_type = 'AVAILABLE_USE' and status_cd = 'A' and grant_obj_type = 'MAN_USER' and grant_to_type = 'RED' and grant_to_obj_type = 'ORG' and a.grant_to_obj_id = #{grantToObjId}

select a.grant_to_obj_type, a.grant_to_obj_id, a.grant_type, a.grant_to_type, case when a.grant_to_obj_type = 'ORG' then o.org_name when a.grant_to_obj_type = 'USER' then u.user_name when a.grant_to_obj_type = 'POST' then p.position_name when a.grant_to_obj_type = 'STATION' then s.station_name else null end as grant_to_obj_name from au_privilege_grant a left join po_organization o on a.grant_to_obj_id = o.org_id and a.grant_to_obj_type = 'ORG' left join po_users u on a.grant_to_obj_id = u.user_id and a.grant_to_obj_type = 'USER' left join po_position p on a.grant_to_obj_id = p.position_id and a.grant_to_obj_type = 'POST' left join po_station s on a.grant_to_obj_id = s.station_id and a.grant_to_obj_type = 'STATION' where a.grant_obj_id = #{resourceId} and a.grant_obj_type = #{resourceBizType} and a.status_cd = 'A' and a.oper_type = 'READ' and a.grant_type in
#{grantType}

select a.grant_to_obj_id org_id, b.org_name, a.grant_obj_id user_id from au_privilege_grant a join po_organization b on a.grant_to_obj_id = b.org_id where status_cd = 'A' and grant_type = 'AVAILABLE_USE' and grant_to_type = 'RED' and grant_to_obj_type = 'ORG' and grant_obj_type = 'MAN_USER' and grant_obj_id = #{userId}

select a.grant_obj_id from au_privilege_grant a join po_organization b on a.grant_to_obj_id = b.org_id
and a.grant_type = 'OWNER' and a.status_cd = 'A' and a.grant_to_obj_type = 'ORG'
#{item}
and STRPOS(concat('.', b.path_code, '.'), concat('.', #{orgId}, '.')) > 0
and INSTR(concat('.', b.path_code, '.'), concat('.', #{orgId}, '.')) > 0
STRPOS(concat('.', b.path_code, '.'), concat('.', #{orgId}, '.')) > 0
INSTR(concat('.', b.path_code, '.'), concat('.', #{orgId}, '.')) > 0
group by a.grant_obj_id
select grant_to_obj_id from au_privilege_grant where grant_type = 'ALLOW_MANAGE' and grant_to_type = 'RED' and grant_obj_id = #{resourceId} and status_cd = 'A'

select grant_obj_id as agentId, count(1) as subNum from au_privilege_grant where grant_obj_type ='DIG_EMPLOYEE' and grant_type = 'AVAILABLE_USE' and status_cd = 'A' and grant_to_type = 'RED' and grant_to_obj_type = 'USER' group by grant_obj_id;
